title: SteelWolf Empire — SKILL.md frontmatter schema
description: Anthropic 2026 authoritative schema for SKILL.md YAML frontmatter. Empire-specific: name field FORBIDDEN per Issue #22063 (namespace bypass).

allowed-tools.description: Space-separated tool list (NOT array). Examples: 'Read Bash Grep' or 'Bash(git add *) Bash(git commit *)'
